function.message: I can’t safely complete this yet: I found Northstar Ledger, but I could not find a canonical project record for “attic rainwater rig,” so I can’t compare two start dates or delete one without guessing. Please provide the exact project folder/name for the attic rainwater rig project.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), then project and deletion workflows. Applied rule to avoid destructive action when evidence does not uniquely support target.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request requires two project start dates and a deletion decision. Canonical evidence was found for only one project (Northstar Ledger). Searches in the projects lane for the second named project returned no matches, so the required comparison target is missing. Deletion workflow requires clarification instead of guessing.
